abilities.name: Void Command
abilities.text: Once per round, when you complete a contract or clear a sector, record a command note and steady the line.

abilities.name: Ashwake Step
abilities.text: When you start a turn in a clear sector, you may treat the first route decision as if the lane was already scouted.

abilities.name: Signal Relay
abilities.text: When another operative fights in your sector, your command presence counts as live field support.

abilities.name: Marshal's Presence
abilities.text: Once per round, reduce local Heat pressure by 1 after a successful objective push.
